metaTitle: Shoulder Pain Support & Bracing | Avana Surgical Systems
metaDescription: Doctor-recommended shoulder support for rotator cuff injury, frozen shoulder, dislocation recovery, and post-surgical rehabilitation. Premium bracing fitted in India.

hero.title: Move your shoulder freely again.
hero.description: From rotator cuff strains to post-surgical rehabilitation, the right support speeds recovery and protects against re-injury.

conditions.title: Rotator Cuff Injury
conditions.description: Tears or strain of the rotator cuff tendons — common in athletes and adults over 40.

conditions.title: Frozen Shoulder
conditions.description: Adhesive capsulitis causing stiffness and restricted movement, often resolved with bracing and physiotherapy.

conditions.title: Shoulder Dislocation
conditions.description: Recurring instability after dislocation — supported by stabilising braces during rehabilitation.

conditions.title: Post-Surgical Recovery
conditions.description: After rotator cuff repair, labral surgery, or joint replacement — controlled immobilisation aids healing.

products.title: Shoulder Immobiliser
products.description: Post-surgical sling and swathe combination for controlled immobilisation after rotator cuff or shoulder surgery.

seoContent.title: Understanding shoulder pain
seoContent.intro: The shoulder is the most mobile joint in the body — and one of the most easily injured. Here's what helps.

sections.heading: Common causes
sections.body: Shoulder pain comes from rotator cuff issues, joint instability, frozen shoulder, or arthritis. Identifying the source matters because treatment varies considerably.

sections.heading: How bracing helps
sections.body: Shoulder bracing immobilises during early healing, protects against re-injury during return-to-activity, and supports rehabilitation programmes.

seoContent.disclaimer: This page is educational. Please consult an orthopaedic specialist for diagnosis and treatment recommendations.

faq.question: How long do I wear a sling after rotator cuff surgery?
faq.answer: Typically 4–6 weeks, but exact duration depends on your specific surgery and surgeon's protocol. Always follow your treating doctor's guidance.

faq.question: Can I sleep with a shoulder brace?
faq.answer: Most post-surgical immobilisers are designed for night-time wear in the early recovery phase. Your surgeon will advise based on your procedure.

cta.title: Need help choosing the right shoulder support?
cta.description: Our specialists can help you select, size, and fit the right brace for your specific condition.
cta.disclaimer: All products dispatched by Osteokart.com — Avana's authorised retail partner.
